title: ECI Statistical Report category_id pins
description: Pinned (state, year) -> ECI Statistical Report category_id mapping. Migrated 2026-05-11 from STATISTICAL_REPORT_CATEGORY_ID dict in backend/yen_gov/sources/eci/categories.py so the admin GUI can edit pins without touching code (CLAUDE.md §6 — config edit, not code change). The pipeline reads this file at import time. Recon discovery still lives in tools/eci_recon/.

x-changelog.description: Initial schema. Migrates the in-code dict to a config file so pin additions become a config edit (admin GUI can write it). Each pin records the upstream cat_name and confirmed_at timestamp for auditability.

sources.description: Per CLAUDE.md §12. Empty array = hand-authored / curated by recon.

pins.description: One entry per (state, year) -> category_id mapping. Order is insignificant.

year.description: Election year. The upstream API only carries 2024+ events.

cat_name.description: Verbatim cat_name returned by /api/election-result?category_id=<id>. Stored for auditability — drift between this string and a fresh fetch is the early-warning signal.

confirmed_at.description: When the pin was last verified live.

notes.description: Optional operator note (e.g. 'second batch — first batch was empty placeholders').
